title: Beecraft
description:
Beecraft is a minigame/mod that tries to reimagine what the ROBLOX game 'Bee Swarm Simulator' by Onett is.

This mod is about collecting pollen in fields, and converting it into honey to improve your equipment, so you can collect even more pollen.
body:
THIS IS A MOD INTENDED TO BE USED ONLY WITHIN A MINECRAFT SERVER

If you want to play the minigame, simply download the mod, and join the server beecraft.minecraft.casa

Join our discord server for help downloading the mod :D
https://discord.gg/mc8RgNmAF8

Beecraft is a minigame/mod that tries to reimagine what the ROBLOX game 'Bee Swarm Simulator' by Onett is.

This mod adds in remakes, and completely original tools and bees which you can use to collect pollen with, pollen can be used to convert into honey at hives, which can be used to buy stronger equipment and improve your pollen-making skills!

Complete quests from different NPCs, and unlock strange new pollen-boosting powers with talismans, as you go higher up into the mountain and find weirder, and stranger fields that have their own unique quirkiness to them.

Different fields have new types of flowers which can benefit you in different ways (?).

Use your bees to help you get pollen efficiently, as different bees together spawn tokens that boost eachother in very interesting ways, experiment with your hive, to find the best type of setup for you.
